text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser and I are on our way home
after a day out when she stops in front of an
apparel store.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Wow! I've hit the mother lode! They're having a hat sale! A hat sale!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I've got a lot of allowance saved up right now, so
I can't miss this!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no, no. This baby's still in her prime! Hehehe.
What I really want to buy is...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Bang, crash, drumroll!
A hat for you! Ta-dah!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ngh! What's with that reaction?! Don't you see
how amazing hats are?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
They can help you look stylish or cute! They can
even help get you out of a pickle!
choice_data_list: I'm not sure I buy that last part...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Mu-mun. Don't believe me? Then, you'll just have
to listen to this to this story. Ahem.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: This is the tale of... my first hat.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
The first time someone bought a hat for me was...
Yes, I believe it was just after I started
elementary school.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I wore it everywhere. On the train, when I woke
up in the middle of the night to go to the
bathroom... As long as I had my hat, I didn't have
a care in the world.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
However, the time of our parting came suddenly
and without warning.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I'll never forget that fateful day. My whole family
took a trip to a park out in the woods.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I got a little carried away running all over and,
before I knew it, I was lost.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
There was no sign of anyone else around, and the
path was growing darker and darker. But I never
lost heart—I had my hat with me, after all!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: But! That's when a cruel gust of wind came blustering through, blowing my hat—my last bastion of support—from my head!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
The story doesn't end there, however. At that
moment, my hat created a miracle.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It danced high into the air and blew right toward
where my parents were!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
My parents traced back the direction the hat
came from, which led them right to me. We were
reunited and lived happily ever after.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...Except, no matter how hard we looked, my hat
was never to be found again.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure that my hat sacrificed itself and chose to
become lost in my place.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
And so, that's an example of the mysterious
powers of hats!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
The moral of the story is that wearing a hat gives
you greater peace of mind! Like, if you got lost,
I'd be able to find you!
choice_data_list: In that case, pick out something nice for me.
In that case, pick out something nice for me.

I guess I don't have to worry if you get lost
again.

I guess I don't have to worry if you get lost
again.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh, leave it to me. I'm a pro when it comes
to choosing hats! I've recommended hats to all
sorts of people!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Friends, cousins... umm... even the old ladies in
my neighborhood! Like I said, I'm a pro!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Let's go take a look! We'll start with the flat
caps...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but smile at Matikanetannhauser as
the two of us dig through all kinds of hats to find
one that suits me.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Don't be silly—I don't get lost anymore. And my
hat doesn't get blown away anymore either.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I put my ear through it now and keep it
on real ti—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she says that, a powerful gust of wind blows,
and...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Gyaaah! My hat! Come back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser runs off right away in pursuit
of her runaway hat. Almost an hour later, I get a
phone call from her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It appears that she's lost and needs me to come
and get her.
